betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ICF Fuels§f are specialized fusion fuel pellets for §bInertial Confinement Fusion§f.

§eFuel Types:§f
• Different fuel compositions available
• Varying power outputs and byproducts
• Choose based on desired output

§eHandler:§f
• Pellets are compressed by laser for fusion
• Each type has specific ignition requirements
• Different fuels yield different products

§aTip:§f Experiment with different fuel types to find the optimal balance for your power needs.
